name: Notion AI
audience: Founders, students, operators, and knowledge workers
benefits: Fits naturally into existing Notion workflows
Useful for notes, docs, and knowledge management
whyNow: If you already use Notion, this is one of the easiest ways to add AI into work you are already doing.

name: Jasper AI
description: AI content generation tool for marketing teams
audience: Marketing teams, freelancers, and content-heavy businesses
benefits: Can speed up campaign copy production
Popular with teams testing AI writing workflows
whyNow: This is the kind of tool people often test when they want faster content output without building a full internal system.
